articles.title: The Rule of Law in Ukraine – More Than Combating Corruption
articles.author: Susan Stewart
articles.summary: A series of scandals in Ukraine has shown that Russia’s war of aggression has not put an end to corruption in the country. Although Ukraine’s specialised institutions play an important role in combating corruption, the country’s governance model does not yet meet the requirements of the rule of law, allowing corruption to remain entrenched. The difficulties involved in fundamentally overhauling th
articles.analysis: El análisis alemán sobre gobernanza ucraniana revela que las reformas anticorrupción son insuficientes para consolidar el estado de derecho en contextos de guerra activa.

articles.title: With, Without, Against Washington: Redefining Europe’s Relations With the United States
articles.author: Barbara Lippert; Stefan Mair
articles.summary: The Pax Americana, which guaranteed the security of Germany and Europe after the Second World War, is coming to an end. Europe can no longer rely on its alliance and partnership with the United States. Even before Donald Trump’s second presidency, Europe was seeking to reduce its dependency on Washington for peace, democracy and prosperity. This cannot be achieved overnight, and will require a sig
articles.analysis: SWP plantea la reconfiguración de las relaciones transatlánticas sin abordar cómo la fragmentación de la alianza occidental afecta la cooperación en seguridad y crimen organizado.

articles.title: Post-war security sector reform
articles.author: COMMSMGR
articles.summary: This Backgrounder examines the role of Security Sector Reform (SSR) in post-war contexts, focusing on how SSR can address the legacy of unlawful te....
articles.analysis: La propuesta de reforma del sector seguridad post-conflicto omite los riesgos de captura por redes criminales durante las transiciones políticas.

articles.title: A modular mindset: Reframing security sector governance and reform in future peace operations
articles.author: COMMSMGR
articles.summary: This Policy Brief presents challenges and opportunities associated with adopting modular approaches in future peace operations.....
articles.analysis: El enfoque modular en operaciones de paz ignora cómo la fragmentación institucional facilita la infiltración de grupos criminales transnacionales.

articles.title: Backing from the brink: Assessing Haiti’s security sector and opportunities for future SSG/R programming
articles.author: COMMSMGR
articles.summary: DCAF carried out a preliminary assessment of the security sector in Haiti to identify entry points for potential additional support focusing on bri....
articles.analysis: La evaluación del sector seguridad haitiano subestima el papel de las pandillas como actores de facto en el colapso institucional del país.

articles.title: Intelligence oversight in the Euro-Atlantic area: Extending to law enforcement functions
articles.author: COMMSMGR
articles.summary: DCAF and the NATO Parliamentary Assembly have collaborated to publish a report that focuses on the democratic governance and oversight of intellige....
articles.analysis: La extensión de la supervisión de inteligencia a funciones policiales refleja la creciente militarización de la seguridad interior en el área euroatlántica.

articles.title: Security sector corruption: The overlooked risk in global stability and development agendas
articles.author: COMMSMGR
articles.summary: Good governance of the security sector is an essential foundation for sustainable development.....
articles.analysis: DCAF identifica la corrupción en el sector seguridad como riesgo sistémico pero no propone mecanismos efectivos para romper la captura institucional.

articles.title: Interim Security Governance Mechanisms for the Occupied Palestinian Territory: Before and after a ceasefire
articles.author: COMMSMGR
articles.summary: Despite the ceasefire of October 10,2025 , the future governance of the security sector in Gaza and the West Bank remains uncertain.....
articles.analysis: Los mecanismos de gobernanza de seguridad para Palestina no consideran cómo las redes de contrabando existentes condicionarán cualquier nuevo orden institucional.

articles.title: A Critical Intersection: Private Security Companies, Gender-based Violence, and the Arms Trade
articles.author: small arms survey
articles.analysis: Small Arms Survey vincula empresas de seguridad privada con violencia de género pero no analiza su rol en la proliferación de armas hacia redes criminales.

articles.title: The Impact of Firearm Violence in Black Communities
articles.author: Rupa Jose
articles.summary: Firearm violence occurs disproportionately in Black communities. This review of articles focuses on the impact of such violence; it is clear that increases in firearm violence are associated with adverse outcomes.
articles.analysis: RAND cuantifica el impacto de la violencia armada en comunidades afroamericanas sin examinar las conexiones con mercados ilegales de armas.

articles.title: The War Is Coming Home to Russia
articles.summary: Western sanctions are biting harder into the fragile Russian economy. And there is growing evidence of the war's negative, long-term impacts on Russian society, from rising crime and corruption to worsening political repression.
articles.analysis: El análisis sobre el impacto interno de la guerra en Rusia no explora cómo la desestabilización social facilita la expansión de redes criminales.

articles.title: Transform/MUCD workshop at DPA conference in Denver; Making the case for regulation of drug markets in Latin America
articles.author: jane
articles.analysis: Transform aboga por la regulación de mercados de drogas en América Latina sin abordar cómo las transiciones regulatorias pueden ser capturadas por grupos criminales existentes.

articles.title: Organization of American States launches groundbreaking report exploring alternatives to the war on drugs
articles.author: Steve Rolles
articles.analysis: La OEA explora alternativas a la guerra contra las drogas pero evita confrontar los intereses geopolíticos que sostienen el prohibicionismo en la región.

articles.title: Harm Reduction for People Who Use or May Encounter Fentanyl/Carfentanil
articles.author: Anonymous
articles.summary: There have been rising number of deaths in the UK, Europe, and North America which have been linked to the use of two opioids - fentanyl and carfentanil. These drugs are reportedly being mixed with heroin, often without the knowledge of the person making the purchase.What is fentanyl/carfentanil?Fentanyl and carfentanil are highly potent, rapidly acting opioid drugs. Fentanyl is estimated to be 10
articles.analysis: Release documenta el aumento de muertes por fentanilo/carfentanilo en Europa pero no analiza cómo estas sustancias reconfiguran las rutas de narcotráfico tradicionales.

articles.title: UN Tax Convention is Historic Opportunity at Risk of Failing
articles.author: Holden Healy
articles.summary: In late November, the UN General Assembly passed a landmark resolution signaling a start on working on a UN framework convention on taxation. This is a testament to decades of work especially by civil society and African states in pushing for a greater role for the United Nations in global tax governance where Global South countries […]The postUN Tax Convention is Historic Opportunity at Risk of F
articles.analysis: La convención fiscal de la ONU enfrenta resistencia de paraísos fiscales que facilitan el blanqueo de capitales del crimen organizado transnacional.
